strName.description: The code name of the plot manager settings entry. Maps to JsonPlotManagerSettings in the decomp.

fTensionPeriod.description: Time in seconds between different tension events being spawned (bad). Originally documented under plot-schema.json (where it appears as a ghost) — its real home is here on JsonPlotManagerSettings → plot_manager/.

fReleasePeriod.description: Time in seconds between different release events being spawned (good).

fSocialPeriod.description: Time in seconds after socialising before characters will socialise with the player again.

dictEventChances.description: Chances for specific plot events to occur. All chances must add up to 1.0. (Originally documented under plot-schema.json as a ghost.)
